meta.listDescription: Inspect pending, queued, failed, and suppressed notification diagnostics in the current admin baseline.
meta.detailDescription: Inspect notification lifecycle state, payload snapshots, and delivery attempts.

list.title: Inspect operational notifications
list.note: This surface shows the notification diagnostics the backend currently exposes for admin and support operations. It stays intentionally lightweight and does not behave like a notification center.
list.openDetail: Open the notification detail to inspect attempts and snapshots.

items.list: Review operational notifications with lightweight status, channel, and category filters.
items.detail: Open a single notification to inspect lifecycle state and delivery snapshots.
items.attempts: See recent delivery attempts, providers, and failure codes when they exist.

items.noInbox: This is not a user-facing inbox or notification center.
items.noReadState: Read and unread management is not part of this baseline.
items.noBulkActions: Bulk actions, archive, delete, and preferences are intentionally out of scope.

detail.title: Notification detail
detail.note: Use this screen to inspect the notification lifecycle state, linked entity context, payload snapshots, and delivery attempts that the backend currently records.
detail.snapshotNote: Use this operational summary to quickly tell whether the current notification is still pending work, a completed diagnostic record, or a visibility-only item with no admin control path.
detail.visibilityNote: This surface is diagnostic visibility only. Requeue, archive, and broader notification management remain outside the current scope.
detail.attemptsNote: Attempt history is shown only from the delivery attempts already recorded by the backend.
detail.noContentSnapshot: No content snapshot saved for this notification.

dropdown.title: Notifications
dropdown.errorHeading: Notifications are not available right now
dropdown.emptyNote: There are no pending, queued, failed, or suppressed notification items right now.

queue.heading: Notification diagnostics
queue.note: Pending, queued, failed, and suppressed deliveries that may need inspection.
queue.errorHeading: Notification diagnostics are not available right now
queue.empty: There are no active notification diagnostics right now.

module.title: Notifications
module.description: Inspect notification delivery diagnostics in a bounded admin surface.

pending.title: Still waiting to complete
pending.note: This notification is still pending or queued, so the main job here is inspection rather than intervention.

sent.title: Sent but not yet confirmed delivered
sent.note: The notification already left the system, but final delivery confirmation is still narrower than a full notification-management workflow.

delivered.title: Delivered diagnostic record
delivered.note: This notification already reached a delivered or read state. The remaining posture here is visibility only.

failed.title: Delivery problem recorded
failed.note: A delivery failure is already recorded for this notification. Use the attempts section below to inspect the current backend evidence.

suppressed.title: Suppressed before delivery
suppressed.note: This notification was suppressed by the backend or provider rules, so this surface stays diagnostic only.

cancelled.title: Cancelled before completion
cancelled.note: This notification was cancelled before completing. Review the stored snapshot only.

none.title: No attempts recorded yet
none.note: The backend has not recorded any delivery attempts for this notification yet.

recorded.title: Attempts are recorded
recorded.note: Delivery attempts exist for this notification. Inspect the timeline below for provider context and error details.

failed.title: Failed attempt history exists
failed.note: At least one recorded delivery attempt failed. The detail below is for diagnosis, not broader notification recovery tooling.

delivered.title: Delivered attempt history exists
delivered.note: At least one attempt already reached delivery. Use the attempt log below only for confirmation and traceability.

visibility.title: Visibility only
visibility.note: This admin baseline does not expose requeue, archive, or broader notification controls here.

fallback.noSnapshot: No snapshot was stored for this field.
fallback.secureActionAttached: A secure action link is attached to this notification.

empty.heading: No operational notifications right now
empty.note: There are no notification diagnostics matching the current filters.

listError.heading: Notifications are not available right now

detailError.heading: Notification detail is not available right now
detailError.note: Could not load this notification detail.

notFound.heading: This notification was not found
notFound.note: The requested notification could not be found or is no longer available.

noAttempts.heading: No delivery attempts yet
noAttempts.note: This notification does not have recorded delivery attempts yet.

errors.PUSH_DEVICE_NOT_REGISTERED: User device is not registered for push notifications
errors.EMAIL_BOUNCED: Email bounced from recipient mail server
